summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 9.2°C) and outside temperature (down 8.9°C) and more moisture-laden outside humidity (up 8%).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 23 miles) and cloud levels (up 160 m) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; temperatures should be quite comfortable. Outside; chilly temperatures are forecasted. Also, low humidity will be noticeable and very little to no wind will be present. Chance of light rain, low clouds are expected, possibly some fog or persistent clouds, and the light is absent. No significant shifts in the weather are expected.
